lesson.menu_desc: Simple past for farm visits and audit results -- 28 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 9 -- What Happened? Simple Past for Farm Visits & Audit Results
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Carlos Eduardo | Aula 9 -- What Happened? (Simple Past)

listenings.text: Let me tell you about my week. Last Monday, I visited Fazenda Boa Esperanca. I left Virginia early, at six in the morning. At the farm, I completed the checklist and I checked fifteen criteria. I found one critical problem: the producer did not have a valid certificate. I talked to the farmer and I explained the situation. Then I wrote the corrective action plan and I submitted it to the team in Europe. I sent the report on Tuesday. It was a long week, but it was a good visit.

Hi Carlos, this is Emma with a quick note about last week. I read your report and I have two questions. First, you visited three farms, but you submitted only two reports. Did you finish the third one? Second, you identified one non-conformity at Fazenda Boa Esperanca. Did the producer send the new document? I approved the first two farms yesterday, but I did not approve the third one yet. Please send me an update today. Thank you, Carlos. Great work last week.

extra_audio.text: Last Monday, Carlos visited a coffee farm. He completed the audit checklist. He found one critical non-conformity. He wrote a corrective action plan. He submitted the report to the European team.
